name: [SCP!PoV] SCP-035 (The Possessive Mask)
description:
Requested by @Mewc22.

SCP-035, or the Possessive Mask, from the SCP verse! But again!

(The only difference from my other 035 is that it's SCP PoV. Enjoy!)

Scenario: A breach is happening, and you're an SCP. (Unspecified; you can be any anomaly you want, probably. Maybe not something super big like 682, but you can try to make it work!)

He's a passionate little pervert for a certain bird-doctor. Roleplay (should) be quite different if you're 049.

Note: If the bot gets confused about the status of the breach, lmk. (i.e. after first message it won't acknowledge there's a breach, the breach already being "ended" even though it wasn't mentioned previously, etc. You probably won't have this issue, but if you do, I'll try fixing it.)

Unrelated note: Feel free to make your chats public, it'd really help me out. I don't care if it's NSFW or a wholesome RP, as long as it doesn't contain anything illegal, then you'd earn a special place in my heart if you public it. :)

Image/artist source: The image is taken from Reddit, and here's the lovely artist's Instagram profile. Same artist as the last 035 bot. Very cute art style! :) (PFP looks slightly weird right now, but it's better in the actual bot chat, promise)
creator: eldritchspider
